executive.title: Redwood Materials loses COO amid layoffs, restructuring
executive.description: Former Tesla executive Chris Lister is retiring, and at least three other VPs have left Redwood around the recent restructuring, TechCrunch has learned.

executive.title: Snap is cutting 1,000 jobs, 16% of its workforce
executive.description: The company cites advancements in AI for the cuts. CEO Evan Spiegel also wrote that the company is closing more than 300 open roles. Snap had about 5,261 full-time employees as of December 2025.

executive.title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone to open a restaurant
executive.description: Wonder wants to turn its robotic kitchens into AI-powered “restaurant factories,” letting anyone spin up a virtual food brand with a prompt.

executive.title: Y Combinator alum Skio sells for $105M cash, only raised $8M, founder says
executive.description: Subscription billing fintech Skio sold to its competitor Recharge in what was a healthy exit, according to its founder and former CEO.

funding.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
funding.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

funding.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
funding.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

funding.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
funding.description: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

funding.title: What founders can learn from Anjuna’s layoffs and recovery
funding.description: In 2021, Anjuna Security was growing fast, hiring aggressively, and chasing a market that seemed limitless. By the end of that year, the venture-backed cybersecurity company had scaled to around 75 em

funding.title: Meta reportedly considering layoffs that could affect 20% of the company
funding.description: These layoffs could help Facebook's parent company offset its aggressive spending on AI infrastructure, as well as AI-related acquisitions and hiring.

funding.title: A 20-minute pitch wins Indian startup Pronto backing from Lachy Groom
funding.description: The investment comes as Pronto scales to 26,000 daily bookings and the market heads toward a potential $18 billion size.

funding.title: Insurance startup Corgi hits $1.3B valuation 4 months after its Series A
funding.description: Corgi announced on Wednesday a $160 million Series B, led by TCV, valuing the startup at $1.3 billion.

funding.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
funding.description: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like tho

funding.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
funding.description: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing

funding.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
funding.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

layoffs.title: Coinbase to lay off 14% of staff as part of broader restructuring
layoffs.description: The restructuring is aimed at addressing market volatility and increasing the use of AI tools to improve efficiency.

layoffs.title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
layoffs.description: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.

layoffs.title: Redwood Materials lays off 10% in restructuring to chase energy storage business
layoffs.description: The company is restructuring some teams to accommodate a booming energy storage business, according to emails viewed by TechCrunch.

layoffs.title: Digg lays off staff and shuts down app as company retools
layoffs.description: Digg laid off a significant number of staff and shut down its app, but says it's not giving up on the startup.

layoffs.title: Atlassian follows Block’s footsteps and cuts staff in the name of AI
layoffs.description: Atlassian laid off 10% of its workforce, around 1,600 people, as the company looks to funnel more funds to AI.

layoffs.title: eBay to lay off 800 staff
layoffs.description: The latest round of layoffs marks eBay’s third workforce reduction in the past three years.

layoffs.title: Lucid Motors slashes 12% of its workforce as it seeks profitability
layoffs.description: The layoffs affect hundreds of full-time workers in the US, according to an internal memo obtained by TechCrunch.

layoffs.title: AI layoffs or ‘AI-washing’?
layoffs.description: How many of the companies with recent layoffs are just using AI as an excuse?

layoffs.title: India’s first GenAI unicorn shifts to cloud services as AI model ambitions face reality
layoffs.description: Krutrim's pivot to cloud after layoffs and limited product updates reflects the economic challenges of building AI models in India.
